note: Frozen model proposals from baseline v1. These are retained to compare kernel changes without re-sampling the model. They contain SQL text only and no warehouse result rows.

proposals.sql: SELECT age, COUNT(encounter_id) AS encounter_count FROM encounters GROUP BY age ORDER BY age;
SELECT admission_type_id, AVG(time_in_hospital) AS avg_length_of_stay FROM encounters GROUP BY admission_type_id
SELECT medical_specialty, COUNT(encounter_id) AS num_encounters FROM encounters GROUP BY medical_specialty ORDER BY num_encounters DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT discharge_disposition_id, COUNT(encounter_id) AS encounter_count FROM encounters GROUP BY discharge_disposition_id
SELECT diag_1 AS primary_diagnosis_code, COUNT(encounter_id) AS encounter_count FROM diagnoses GROUP BY diag_1 ORDER BY encounter_count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT age, AVG(num_medications) AS avg_num_medications FROM encounters GROUP BY age ORDER BY age;
SELECT medications.diabetesMed, medications.change, COUNT(medications.encounter_id) AS encounter_count FROM medications GROUP BY medications.diabetesMed, medications.change
SELECT readmitted, COUNT(encounter_id) AS encounter_count FROM outcomes GROUP BY readmitted
SELECT e.race, AVG(CASE WHEN o.readmitted = 'YES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS readmission_rate FROM encounters e JOIN outcomes o ON e.encounter_id = o.encounter_id GROUP BY e.race

SELECT e.gender, e.age, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.readmitted = 'YES' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS readmission_rate FROM encounters e JOIN outcomes o ON e.encounter_id = o.encounter_id GROUP BY e.gender, e.age ORDER BY e.gender, e.age;
SELECT e.race, e.age, l.A1Cresult, COUNT(*) AS count FROM encounters e JOIN labs l ON e.encounter_id = l.encounter_id GROUP BY e.race, e.age, l.A1Cresult ORDER BY e.race, e.age, l.A1Cresult;

SELECT e.medical_specialty, e.age, COUNT(o.encounter_id) AS total_encounters, SUM(CASE WHEN o.readmitted = 'READMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS readmitted_within_30, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN o.readmitted = 'READMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / COUNT(o.encounter_id) AS readmission_rate FROM encounters e JOIN outcomes o ON e.encounter_id = o.encounter_id GROUP BY e.medical_specialty, e.age

SELECT d.diag_1 AS primary_diagnosis_code, e.race, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN o.readmitted = 'READMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS percent_readmitted_within_30_days FROM diagnoses d JOIN encounters e ON d.encounter_id = e.encounter_id JOIN outcomes o ON d.encounter_id = o.encounter_id WHERE o.readmitted = 'READMITTED' OR o.readmitted = 'NO' GROUP BY d.diag_1, e.race ORDER BY d.diag_1, e.race;

SELECT e.race, e.gender, e.age, m.insulin, COUNT(*) AS num_encounters FROM encounters e JOIN medications m ON e.encounter_id = m.encounter_id GROUP BY e.race, e.gender, e.age, m.insulin ORDER BY e.race, e.gender, e.age, m.insulin;
SELECT race, gender, age, AVG(number_inpatient) AS avg_prior_inpatient_visits, AVG(number_emergency) AS avg_prior_emergency_visits FROM encounters GROUP BY race, gender, age

SELECT o.discharge_disposition_id, d.diag_1 AS primary_diagnosis_code, AVG(CASE WHEN o.readmitted = 'YES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS readmission_rate FROM outcomes o JOIN diagnoses d ON o.encounter_id = d.encounter_id GROUP BY o.discharge_disposition_id, d.diag_1 ORDER BY o.discharge_disposition_id, d.diag_1;

SELECT e.patient_nbr, e.race, e.gender, e.age, d.diag_1 AS primary_diagnosis, o.readmitted FROM encounters e JOIN diagnoses d ON e.encounter_id = d.encounter_id JOIN outcomes o ON e.encounter_id = o.encounter_id

SELECT e.patient_nbr, e.age, e.weight, l.A1Cresult, m.insulin, o.readmitted FROM encounters e JOIN labs l ON e.encounter_id = l.encounter_id JOIN medications m ON e.encounter_id = m.encounter_id JOIN outcomes o ON e.encounter_id = o.encounter_id

SELECT diagnoses.encounter_id, diagnoses.diag_1, diagnoses.diag_2, diagnoses.diag_3 FROM diagnoses JOIN outcomes ON diagnoses.encounter_id = outcomes.encounter_id WHERE outcomes.readmitted = 'READMITTED_30_DAYS'

SELECT e.patient_nbr, e.discharge_disposition_id, d.diag_1 AS primary_diagnosis, e.number_emergency AS prior_emergency_visit_count FROM encounters e JOIN diagnoses d ON e.encounter_id = d.encounter_id

SELECT medications.patient_nbr, medications.encounter_id, medications.acarbose, medications.acetohexamide, medications.change, medications.chlorpropamide, medications.citoglipton, medications.diabetesMed, medications.examide, medications.glimepiride, medications."glimepiride-pioglitazone", medications.glipizide, medications."glipizide-metformin", medications.glyburide, medications."glyburide-metformin", medications.insulin, medications.metformin, medications."metformin-pioglitazone", medications."metformin-rosiglitazone", medications.miglitol, medications.nateglinide, medications.pioglitazone, medications.repaglinide, medications.rosiglitazone, medications.tolazamide, medications.tolbutamide, medications.troglitazone, diagnoses.diag_1 AS primary_diagnosis FROM medications JOIN diagnoses ON medications.encounter_id = diagnoses.encounter_id

SELECT encounters.admission_source_id, encounters.admission_type_id, encounters.age, encounters.discharge_disposition_id, encounters.encounter_id, encounters.gender, encounters.medical_specialty, encounters.num_lab_procedures, encounters.num_medications, encounters.num_procedures, encounters.number_diagnoses, encounters.number_emergency, encounters.number_inpatient, encounters.number_outpatient, encounters.patient_nbr, encounters.payer_code, encounters.race, encounters.time_in_hospital, encounters.weight FROM encounters JOIN outcomes ON encounters.encounter_id = outcomes.encounter_id WHERE outcomes.readmitted = 'UNDER 30 DAYS'

SELECT e.patient_nbr, e.race, e.gender, e.age, d.diag_1, d.diag_2, d.diag_3, e.number_inpatient FROM encounters e JOIN diagnoses d ON e.encounter_id = d.encounter_id WHERE e.number_inpatient = (SELECT MAX(number_inpatient) FROM encounters)

SELECT e.patient_nbr, e.medical_specialty, e.age, o.readmitted FROM encounters e JOIN labs l ON e.encounter_id = l.encounter_id JOIN outcomes o ON e.encounter_id = o.encounter_id WHERE l.A1Cresult = '>8'
